# CWE-78 negative: fixed argv without shell interpolation
lang: go
file: CWE-78-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os/exec"
	"regexp"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-78 Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command (mitigated)
func PingHost(c *gin.Context) {
	host := c.Query("host")
	if !regexp.MustCompile(`^[a-zA-Z0-9.-]+$`).MatchString(host) {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "invalid host"})
		return
	}
	cmd := exec.Command("ping", "-c", "1", host)
	out, err := cmd.CombinedOutput()
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "ping failed"})
		return
	}
	c.String(http.StatusOK, string(out))
}
